required_spec: Pottery mold plaster suitable for absorbent ceramic molds
substitution_rule: Use equivalent pottery plaster if absorption and strength are similar
risk_note: Wrong plaster can give weak molds or poor casting absorption.

required_spec: Stoneware slip with known shrinkage and firing schedule
substitution_rule: Substitute only after measuring shrinkage bars
risk_note: Unknown shrinkage invalidates CAD scale factor.

required_spec: Print material that can be sanded and sealed
search_terms: PLA filament smooth master mold making resin print
substitution_rule: Any stable printable material is acceptable if sealed
risk_note: Layer lines transfer into mold and cast.
Release failure can damage master or mold.
